nasb.text: And she gave birth to her firstborn son; and she wrapped Him in cloths, and laid Him in a manger, because there was no room for them in the inn.

esv.text: And she gave birth to her firstborn son and wrapped him in swaddling cloths and laid him in a manger, because there was no place for them in the inn.

cnv.text: 生了頭胎兒子，用布包著，放在馬槽裡，因為客店裡沒有地方。

ccb.text: 便生下第一胎，是个儿子。她用布把孩子裹好，安放在马槽里，因为旅店没有房间了。

csbs.text: 就生了她的头胎儿子。她用布把他包起来放在马槽里，因为客店里没有地方给他们。
